title: Drupal Extension Schema
description: Drupal CMS integration extension for OSSA agents. Maps OSSA manifests to Drupal's ai_agents module, Tool API, and ECA event system.

ai_agent_plugin.description: Plugin ID for the Drupal ai_agents module (e.g. 'ossa_agent')

tools.description: Drupal Tool API plugin IDs to grant this agent (e.g. 'tool:read:content_load')

eca_events.description: ECA (Event-Condition-Action) events this agent reacts to

permissions.description: Drupal permissions required for this agent to operate

content_types.description: Drupal content types this agent operates on

views_displays.description: Views displays to expose agent data
